summary: PART I Item 1. B usiness Overview of the Fund and the Shares The Fund is a Cayman Islands limited liability company that was formed and registered on January 25, 2018. The Funds purpose is to hold the top digital assets by market capitalization that meet certain criteria set by the Fund.
